My mom was scared. Than they closed the trunk and left. What the he'll were they doing. My dad did not get a name. I wish I knew who those two officers were. One was dark and tall and the other officer was a Hispanic man. I still can't think of a reason why they did that. I wish my dad would have gotten a name or call me at that time. There are good officers put there but there are lots of bad officers👎 who shouldn't be on the force. Sorry but I'm still upset fore this just happened on 09/02/23. My mom has been sick after that even though she said she'll let God take care of them.  I wonder what those two officers were doing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sarah Hernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKvgHQz0uniqhpDlgcOlfvMNLAvbebA9-I4nkOUrCeN_EoNNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"An officer named Felix Gonzalez (a so called sergeant) is a bully and a danger to the public in my opinion. He assaulted Me by grabbing me by the arm and pulling me about 30 feet out of a gate. We are not from Madera but went there to attend a high school football game. My friend was lost and she had my tickets. By the time the second quarter started I explain the situation to the ticket collectors and when the officer approached me I explained it to him as well. He took it upon himself to manhandle me and throw me out. He did not say anything about trespassing but did mention defrauding an Innkeeper.  Even though I told him a few times that the tickets were paid for. When I asked him what defrauding an Innkeeper meant he would not answer me. And even after my ticket arrived he would not allow me in and also told the security not to allow my friend and her daughter's in even though they weren't there at the time.  His ego will get someone seriously hurt if it hasn't already!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Abe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIIho49lBK55ZctZDJxB8GlYm-t_LvFC8WV44G1S2jhlRiD3g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Generally I’ve had great things to say about MPD. Until recently, I’ve voiced countless times about excessive speed on my residential street, Roberts ave. Other residents have complaint as well. Recently signs were added. But this is not enough. The speed limit is 25mph, while playing outside with my kids I’ve witness folks drive 40-50. To the point, **if there is an accident, and someone is struck, the city can be sued for negligence. MPD owes a duty of care ti it’s residents. If you are getting calls about excessive speeds in residential areas, why ignore and drop to the least urgent of your to do’s!?? So you're busy enough that I can't talk but you can take time to tell me a second time your busy and explain yourself then hangup. Perfect logic.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"D G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLARGfYHObhJiMAtH5d6z4MwSAzjPkNHRl3j_RgZJqBmhb87Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Every time I have called the police, they have come, quickly enough to shut a problem down.  I have appreciated their quick and professional response. I live in a condo community with many renters so sometimes bikes are stolen, there is noise etc.  The police have always been helpful in resolving problems.  They have even come to our community and spoken to our residents about safety.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"J L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXq1os-9BNndkzV2WPYGv7t9I9CyKv7gaoJwQak7Gsvr8bD-FqE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Officer Roberto (?) was very nice and helpful.

He also told me how to do the registration sticker on my car correctly to prevent it from being stolen.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael Arcune","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKGQ2RDY3ScRiJMCWPOeFlvJHj2SNhDtcBCrCpqp1oKGUCOgg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came home from work late years ago. She was pregnant and very mad at my our roomate for trying to make a phone call.  The baby was very sick.  So....I went to the mountain view police dept and met the captain.  He had the entire department looking for her. Asked me if I had any ideas. Remembered her favorite phone in the alleyway by our house.  She was there.  I have never met a more professional officer in my life.  He reflects the entire department.  They are awesome.  Thanks guys.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"kavitha herle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkibPEwCfDJ-2-GbQuIc9N-YZ0F4TggQAzMHcA2Icy-bQZpkuiFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have had some great experience with Mountain View Police Department. Every. Single. Time. I’ve lived here for 20 years. Granted their jobs used to be a LOT easier. They had waaaay more funding before. Your houses, your cars, your mail.. it’s starting to happen even here in Los Altos. And the poor Los Altos police will soon be unable to do their job also.
